title: helichrysum lambertianum
intro: Helichrysum lambertianum, also known as the 'Olive-Hill Paperflower', is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum lambertianum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the body's natural detoxification processes. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
